title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence concerns and the need for community safety measures in public spaces.

title: Leistritz Extrusion Hosts Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a hub for advanced manufacturing and polymer technology innovation.

title: Father of Murder Suspect Arrested in Chesterfield County
summary: Maurice Brown Sr. was arrested for tampering with evidence in connection with a shooting death investigation in Chesterfield County.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the complexities of crime investigations and potential family involvement.

title: Fatal Crash on I-85 South Involves Tractor-Trailer
summary: A tractor-trailer collided with a stopped vehicle on I-85 South, resulting in one fatality after an earlier crash.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about highway safety and the dangers of distracted or impaired driving.

title: Severe Weather Delays Truist Championship Opening
summary: Severe weather caused delays in the opening round of the Truist Championship at Quail Hollow in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the impact of weather on major sporting events and the need for safety precautions.

title: Rowan County Man Arrested on Kidnapping, Assault Charges
summary: Don Allen Parson Jr. was arrested after a week-long search, facing charges including domestic assault and kidnapping.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the prevalence of domestic violence and the efforts of law enforcement to apprehend suspects.

title: Atrium Health Earns Top Patient Safety Grades
summary: Atrium Health received the most "A" ratings for patient safety in North Carolina from Leapfrog's Spring 2026 report.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes Atrium Health's commitment to providing high-quality and safe healthcare services.

title: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles Announces Resignation
summary: Mayor Vi Lyles will resign on June 30 to spend time with family, marking a significant change in city leadership.
charlotte_impact: Signals a transition in Charlotte's political landscape and raises questions about future leadership.

title: Man Dies Months After Moped Crash in Charlotte
summary: Elijah Smoot died nine months after a moped crash in east Charlotte. Police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Underlines the dangers of moped accidents and the importance of traffic safety.

title: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles to Resign from Office
summary: Mayor Lyles, the city's first Black female mayor, will resign June 30 to focus on family, ending her tenure.
charlotte_impact: Marks the end of an era in Charlotte's leadership and opens the door for new perspectives.

title: Scattered Rain and Heavy Downpours Expected Thursday
summary: The forecast predicts scattered rain and heavy downpours for Thursday morning, with cooler temperatures on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides essential weather information for residents to prepare for potential disruptions.

title: CATS Riders to Weigh In on Fare Modernization
summary: CATS riders have a final opportunity to provide feedback on proposed fare changes, including tap-and-go payments.
charlotte_impact: Allows public input on important changes to the city's public transportation system.

title: Weather Alert: Heavy Rain, Severe Weather Possible
summary: Charlotte faces a risk of heavy rain and potential severe weather Wednesday night into Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to potential hazards and encourages preparedness for adverse weather conditions.

title: I-85 South Reopens After Flooding Near Gastonia
summary: A section of I-85 South near Gastonia reopened after heavy rains caused standing water and closure.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the impact of heavy rainfall on infrastructure and transportation.

title: Anthony Foxx Leads Talks on $19.4B Transit Expansion
summary: Former mayor Anthony Foxx leads discussions on the CATS 2055 plan, a $19.4B public transit expansion project.
charlotte_impact: Highlights long-term planning efforts to improve transportation and connectivity in Charlotte.
